title: ROS 2 Level 2 Pipeline KPI
description: End-to-end pipeline KPI derived from Level 1 per-node pairs. Covers full-pipeline latency (sensor-to-control), throughput, message drop rate, per-stage latency breakdown, and system utilization. Produced by analyze_pipeline_latency.py --json-out.

schema_version.description: Schema identifier and version — must be 'level2_v1'.

pipeline.description: Identification of the pipeline's entry and exit points and stage sequence.

input_topic.description: Primary sensor input topic that enters the pipeline (e.g. '/scan').

output_topic.description: Final control output topic produced by the pipeline (e.g. '/cmd_vel_smoothed').

stage_sequence.description: Ordered list of pipeline stages present in this session.

e2e_latency_ms.description: End-to-end latency statistics from pipeline input to pipeline output. Computed by summing the representative per-stage mean/p90/p99 latencies (method='chained'). This is a conservative lower-bound estimate; message-traced end-to-end would require header correlation across all stages.

n.description: Minimum sample count across all stage representatives (conservative).

method.description: 'chained': sum of per-stage representative pair latencies from Level 1. 'traced': direct message-level correlation from bag (more accurate, requires header stamps on all topics).

throughput_hz.description: Effective pipeline throughput in Hz — the minimum throughput across all stage representatives (the bottleneck rate).

drop_rate_pct.description: Estimated message drop rate: percentage of sensor-stage input messages that did not produce a corresponding control-stage output. Computed as max(0, 1 - n_control / n_sensor) * 100.

bottleneck_stage.description: Pipeline stage with the highest mean latency contribution.

stage_latency_ms.description: Per-stage latency breakdown. Keys are pipeline stage names. Each entry uses the representative (highest trigger-count) pair for that stage.

cpu_mean_pct.description: Mean CPU utilization percentage across the session. Null when not collected.

cpu_max_pct.description: Peak CPU utilization percentage across the session. Null when not collected.

level1_source.description: Absolute path to the Level 1 kpi.json file used as input.

metadata.description: Session provenance — same structure as Level 1 metadata.

datetime.description: UTC timestamp of KPI generation in ISO 8601 format.

stage_entry.description: Latency statistics for one pipeline stage, derived from its highest-trigger-count (node, input, output) pair.

mean_ms.description: Mean latency for this stage's representative pair in milliseconds.

n.description: Sample count for the representative pair.

throughput_hz.description: Observed throughput for this stage's representative output topic.

nodes.description: All nodes in this pipeline stage observed in the session.

representative_node.description: Node name of the highest-trigger-count pair for this stage.

representative_input.description: Input topic of the representative pair.

representative_output.description: Output topic of the representative pair.
